# Jan Komínek — Full Context for LLMs

This file provides extended context about Jan Komínek for language models with large context windows.
See also: /llms.txt for the summary version.

---

## Identity

**Name:** Jan Komínek (also written Jan Kominek without diacritics)
**Disambiguation:** Software engineer and developer — NOT the Czech actor of the same name.
**Title:** Senior Frontend / Fullstack Engineer
**Location:** Prague, Czech Republic
**Availability:** Part-time B2B contracts, up to 10 hours/week
**Email:** contact@jankominek.com
**Website:** https://jankominek.com
**LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/jan-kominek

---

## Education

**Prague University of Economics and Business (VŠE)**
Bachelor's degree — Applied Computer Science (in progress, since Sep 2024)
Grade 2 average. Leading backend + DevOps architecture for team project (Diář FISáka) on Hetzner VPS.

**Smíchov Secondary Technical School (SSPŠ)**
High School Diploma — Cyber / Computer Forensics & Counterterrorism (Sep 2020 – May 2024)
Graduated with full marks in technical subjects. Final thesis: full-stack e-commerce store with DevOps and CI/CD.

---

## Work Experience

### CORAC Engineering — Senior Frontend Engineer (current, since Apr 2025)
Sole frontend engineer building DeepTrace — a data provenance and integrity platform for Earth Observation data.
- Architected interactive D3.js lineage visualisation for complex supply-chain graphs
- Implemented client-side hash-chain verification following zero-trust architecture
- Integrated AWS Cognito (OAuth) for secure client-side authentication
Stack: Vue 3, TypeScript, D3.js, AWS Cognito, Vite, pnpm, Shadcn

### Intedat — Fullstack Engineer (current, since Sep 2024)
Developing and maintaining a fullstack data platform focused on scalability, search performance, and reliable infrastructure.
- End-to-end feature delivery — Nuxt on the frontend, AdonisJS on the backend
- Elasticsearch-powered search across large datasets
- CI/CD + DigitalOcean Linux infrastructure for production deployments
Stack: Node.js, TypeScript, Nuxt, AdonisJS, PostgreSQL, Redis, Elasticsearch

### Smíchovská SPŠ — Lecturer & Organizer (recurring, Jul 2022 – present, 4 editions)
Solo-taught "Intro and Basics of 2D Graphics" for ~50 students per year (8th & 9th grade). Consistently top-rated teacher.

### IONT tech — Fullstack Engineer (Aug 2023 – Sep 2024)
Led full-stack development of a web platform managing electric vehicle chargers — from infrastructure setup to payment integration.
- Built public-facing charging app with online payment (ČSOB) and remote charger authorization
- Designed and deployed infrastructure from scratch on IaaS — Docker Swarm microservices
- Developed auto-updating firmware delivery system with the hardware team
Stack: SvelteKit, Fastify, TypeScript, Docker Swarm, MongoDB, Redis, Linux

### Precismo — Fullstack Developer (Jan 2023 – Nov 2023)
Fullstack developer on a cross-functional Agile team building an internal customer portal. Collaborated with 6 devs and 1 PM in Scrum.
Stack: React, Node.js, Playwright, SQL

### Haxagon — Frontend Developer (Oct 2022 – Jul 2023)
Frontend on a cybersecurity e-learning platform. Introduced improved dev processes for code quality and delivery flow.
Stack: Vue.js, TypeScript, Tailwind

### KMK Family Business — IT Support (Jun 2020 – Feb 2024)
Hands-on IT support: Windows workstations, network printers, IoT devices, local network infrastructure, and safety training.

---

## Technical Skills

**Frontend:** Vue.js (primary), React.js, SvelteKit, Svelte 5, Nuxt.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS 4, HTML5, CSS3
**Backend:** Node.js, AdonisJS, Express.js, Fastify, REST APIs
**Databases:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Redis, Elasticsearch, BullMQ
**DevOps:** Docker, Docker Swarm, Kubernetes, Traefik, CI/CD, DigitalOcean, AWS (Cognito, S3), Cloudflare Workers, Linux
**Embedded / Systems:** Rust (no-std, SPI drivers, embedded-hal), Raspberry Pi, bare-metal peripheral control
**Tools:** Git, Figma, Agile / Scrum, Zod, D3.js, Stripe, Shadcn

---

## Projects

### CORAC SITH — DeepTrace GUI (order: 1)
**URL:** https://jankominek.com/projects/corac_sith
**Client:** CORAC Engineering
**Role:** Senior Frontend Engineer (sole frontend)
**Category:** Frontend / Data Provenance / Security
**Stack:** Vue 3, TypeScript, D3.js, AWS Cognito, Vite
**Description:** Data provenance and integrity platform for sensitive Earth Observation data. Implements client-side hash-chain verification (zero-trust), interactive D3.js supply-chain lineage graphs, and OAuth via AWS Cognito.

### CORAC Scorecard (order: 2)
**URL:** https://jankominek.com/projects/corac_scorecard
**Client:** CORAC Engineering
**Category:** Frontend / Cyber Audit
**Stack:** Vue.js, TypeScript
**Description:** NIS2 compliance cyber audit tool with scorecard and PDF export.

### IONT Charge (order: 3)
**URL:** https://jankominek.com/projects/iont_charge
**Client:** IONT tech
**Category:** Fullstack / Fintech / EV
**Stack:** SvelteKit, Fastify, TypeScript, Docker Swarm, MongoDB
**Description:** Public EV charging application with ČSOB payment integration, remote charger authorization, and Docker Swarm microservices infrastructure.

### IONT Admin (order: 4)
**URL:** https://jankominek.com/projects/iont_admin
**Client:** IONT tech
**Category:** Fullstack / Admin
**Stack:** SvelteKit, Fastify, Redis, WebSockets
**Description:** Admin panel for managing EV charging infrastructure. Real-time firmware updates and station diagnostics.

### IONT Info (order: 5)
**URL:** https://jankominek.com/projects/iont_info
**Client:** IONT tech
**Category:** Fullstack / Public Info
**Stack:** SvelteKit, Fastify
**Description:** Public-facing EV charger info app.

### Pangolin (order: 6)
**URL:** https://jankominek.com/projects/pangolin
**Client:** Work
**Category:** Frontend / Dashboard
**Stack:** React, Chart.js
**Description:** Interactive analytics dashboard with complex data visualisation.

### Noteful (order: 7)
**URL:** https://jankominek.com/projects/noteful
**Category:** Personal / Fullstack
**Stack:** Vue, Node.js
**Description:** Note-taking app with tag hierarchies and real-time sync.

### Disenchantment (order: 8)
**URL:** https://jankominek.com/projects/disenchantment
**Category:** Personal / Open Source
**Stack:** Java, Minecraft Plugin API
**Description:** Open-source Minecraft plugin with 3,000+ downloads. Enhances the vanilla enchanting system.

### Portfolio v5 (order: 9)
**URL:** https://jankominek.com
**Category:** Personal / Design
**Stack:** SvelteKit 2, Svelte 5, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, Cloudflare Workers
**Description:** Current portfolio website (this site). English + Czech i18n, Cloudflare Workers deployment.

---

## In Progress / Personal Projects

### Raspberry Pi Departure Board
Custom departure board built from scratch using a Raspberry Pi Zero 2 WH, displays, and PIR motion sensors. Programmed in Rust. Exploring embedded systems development outside of web work. Blog posts planned.

---

## Blog

**URL:** https://jankominek.com/blog

### Traefik with Cloudflare inside Docker — Simplified
**URL:** https://jankominek.com/blog/traefik_with_cloudflare_inside_docker_simplified
**Tags:** DevOps, Docker, Traefik, Cloudflare
**Description:** A practical guide to running Traefik as a reverse proxy with Cloudflare DNS inside Docker.

### Planned posts
- Building a Raspberry Pi departure board — e-ink displays, PIR motion sensors, and Rust from scratch (RUST / EMBEDDED)
- No-std SPI drivers and bare-metal display init in Rust — Pi Zero 2 WH without a crate (RUST / HARDWARE)

---

## Site Technology

- Framework: SvelteKit 2 + Svelte 5 (runes: $state, $derived, $effect)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS 4
- Content: MDSvex (Markdown → Svelte components)
- i18n: svelte-i18n (English + Czech)
- Deployment: Cloudflare Workers via @sveltejs/adapter-cloudflare
- Validation: Zod v4
- Contact form: Submits to Discord webhook via /api/forms
- Analytics: Google Analytics (privacy-respecting, no PII)

---

*This file is maintained manually. For the live site see https://jankominek.com*
